title: Assist, not abdicate: Drawing the line on lawyers’ use of AI
description: #Benchmark: The Supreme Court has flagged what many had begun to suspect: petitions increasingly bear the imprint of artificial intelligence — not just in language, but in substance.
content:
It often starts as help for lawyers using AI. A line here, a paragraph there — and before long, the brief is no longer entirely their own.
That quiet shift has now reached the courtroom door.

title: UK eyes Anthropic - Firstpost
description: The UK government is stepping up efforts to attract leading artificial intelligence firm Anthropic, as it looks to position itself as a global hub for advanced AI. This comes as tensions grow between Anthropic and the US government over military use of its AI technology.

title: Data centers delayed by infrastructure
description: In the red dirt of Abilene, Texas, more than 6,000 workers travel around on electric buggies, spending day and night constructing a massive data center that will feed the world's growing artificial intelligence needs. When completed this year, the eight sprawling buildings -- which OpenAI will use -- will consume 1.2 gigawatts of power, or enough electricity for nearly 1 million American households.

title: Indian film studios are using AI to cut costs, speed production, despite mixed audience reactions
description: Indian film studios are embracing Artificial Intelligence to slash production costs and speed up movie making. This technology helps overcome India's many languages with AI dubbing. While audiences have mixed reactions, studios are using AI for everything from creating new content to re-releasing older films with altered endings. Tech giants are partnering with Indian filmmakers to advance AI-driven storytelling.

title: Judges are increasingly using AI to draft rulings and prepare for hearings
description: When Xavier Rodriguez, a Texas-based federal judge, prepares for a hearing, he usually begins by turning to artificial intelligence. He feeds the relevant court filings into an AI tool that quickly produces a timeline of the case and the claims that parties are making for him to review.
